_comment: Single source of truth for transaction category inference. Consumed by components/finance/categories.ts (web app + review) AND scripts/infer-categories.mjs. Ordered: first matching rule wins, so STRUCTURAL rules (transfers, card/loan payments, investments) come before merchant rules, and specific merchants before generic buckets. `pattern` is a case-insensitive substring of the transaction description, or a /regex/flags form. `category` is the bucket assigned. Keep the vocabulary stable — the Review page groups by these strings. Balance-sheet movements (Transfers, Credit Card Payment, Loan Payment, Investments) are excluded from the income/spend P&L in categories.ts EXCLUDED_FROM_PNL — they move value between accounts and show up in net worth, not consumption.
